title: Sync bundled skill-spec-management _data/ with v0.1.10
description:
The bundled copy at src/agent_takt/_data/claude_skills/skill-spec-management/ is behind the APM-installed v0.1.10 version. spec.py and SKILL.md both differ from .claude/skills/skill-spec-management/. The extra files (.github/, .gitignore, CLAUDE.md, README.md, apm.yml, tests/) were already removed by the previous bead but spec.py and SKILL.md still need updating.

Steps:
1. Copy .claude/skills/skill-spec-management/spec.py to src/agent_takt/_data/claude_skills/skill-spec-management/spec.py
2. Copy .claude/skills/skill-spec-management/SKILL.md to src/agent_takt/_data/claude_skills/skill-spec-management/SKILL.md
3. Check src/agent_takt/_data/agents_skills/task/spec-management/ — if spec.py or SKILL.md differ from .agents/skills/task/spec-management/, update those too.
acceptance_criteria: src/agent_takt/_data/agents_skills/task/spec-management/ is in sync with .agents/skills/task/spec-management/ where applicable
